summary: Complete testing of Location Alarm PWA trigger mode features and slider fix. Backend: 15/15 tests pass for trigger_mode/trigger_time. Frontend: All features working - slider has data-vaul-no-drag and bigger touch targets (h-6 w-6), Distance/Time toggle works in both AlarmForm and TripForm, badges display correctly ('m radius' vs 'min before').

console_warnings.issue: Missing DialogContent Description warning - non-blocking accessibility warning
HTML hydration warning: span cannot be child of select/option - dev instrumentation, not production issue

passed_tests: BUG FIX: Slider has data-vaul-no-drag attribute on Root
BUG FIX: Slider thumb has h-6 w-6 (bigger touch target for mobile)
BUG FIX: Slider track has h-2 (thicker)
FEATURE: AlarmForm - Distance/Time toggle buttons present
FEATURE: AlarmForm - Distance mode shows radius slider (100-5000m)
FEATURE: AlarmForm - Time mode shows time slider (5-120min)
FEATURE: Create distance-based alarm - Bangalore with 500m radius
FEATURE: Create time-based alarm - Hyderabad with 30min trigger
FEATURE: AlarmList - distance alarm shows '500m radius' badge
FEATURE: AlarmList - time alarm shows '30 min before' blue badge
FEATURE: TripForm - per-waypoint Distance/Time toggle present
FEATURE: TripForm - created 3-stop trip (Bangalore→Kurnool→Hyderabad)
FEATURE: TripForm - Kurnool waypoint set to TIME mode (30min)
FEATURE: TripForm - trip name auto-generated as 'Bengaluru to Hyderabad'
BACKEND: POST /api/alarms with trigger_mode='distance' - saved correctly
BACKEND: POST /api/alarms with trigger_mode='time', trigger_time=30 - saved correctly
BACKEND: POST /api/alarms with trigger_mode='time', trigger_time=45 - saved correctly
BACKEND: PUT /api/alarms/{id} - update distance to time mode works
BACKEND: PUT /api/alarms/{id} - update time to distance mode works
BACKEND: GET /api/alarms returns trigger_mode and trigger_time fields
BACKEND: Trip with mixed trigger modes - waypoints have correct modes
REGRESSION: All 5 bottom nav buttons work (Trips, Alarms, +, History, Location)
REGRESSION: Map renders correctly
REGRESSION: Tracking toggle works
seed_data_creation: Created during testing: 2 single alarms (Bangalore distance, Hyderabad time), 1 trip (Bangalore→Kurnool→Hyderabad) with 3 stops. Left in database for visual verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trigger mode feature fully tested. slider.jsx has data-vaul-no-drag and h-6 w-6 thumb. AlarmForm and TripForm have Distance/Time toggles. AlarmList shows correct badges for each mode. useLocationTracking.js handles both distance check (d <= radius) and time-based ETA calculation (using GPS speed or fallback 11 m/s). Console warnings are dev-mode instrumentation only.
